task_objective: Implement commit 2 of the refresh_games Ludusavi call optimization plan by running the read-only preview and backup-list status probes concurrently.
design_decisions: Kept PyludusaviAdapter.refresh_statuses() public behavior and return shape unchanged.
Used a local ThreadPoolExecutor with two workers for backup preview and backups list only.
Kept filtering behavior for installed games and Ignored or Cancelled decisions unchanged.

results.red_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_ludusavi.py::test_refresh_statuses_runs_preview_and_backups_probes_concurrently failed before implementation because backups_list did not start while preview was running
results.targeted_tests: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_ludusavi.py::test_refresh_statuses_runs_preview_and_backups_probes_concurrently tests/test_installed_games_only.py tests/test_backup_list_filter.py passed
